pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.0.0.RELEASE to 3.3.13 to align with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 17 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6, causing runtime failures or missing APIs when migrating to JDK 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 17 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compiling with source/target 1.8 on JDK 17 may fail or produce incompatible bytecode if modern language features are used; explicitly setting 17 ensures correct compilation flags.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add dependency management for thymeleaf-extras-springsecurity4 to resolve version conflicts in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 changes dependency management and may not provide the correct version of Thymeleaf extras for Spring Security, leading to missing classes or version mismatches at runtime.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: The javax.servlet package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using it causes a ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime, or a compile error if the javax.servlet dependency is not present.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate Spring Security HTTP configuration from the deprecated fluent API (using .and()) to the new lambda-based DSL introduced in Spring Security 5.7+/6.x.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: The .and() method and the old fluent builder style are removed in Spring Security 6 (required for Spring Boot 3), causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in Spring Security configuration.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: antMatchers is removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Replace deprecated authorizeRequests with authorizeHttpRequests in Spring Security configuration.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: authorizeRequests is removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers inside the authorization rules.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: antMatchers is removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Replace deprecated regexMatchers with requestMatchers inside the authorization rules.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: regexMatchers is removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in WebSecurity configuration.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: antMatchers is deprecated in Spring Security 6 and removed in later versions; code fails to compile or runs with deprecation warnings that break strict builds.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in HttpSecurity authorization configuration.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: antMatchers is deprecated in Spring Security 6 and removed in later versions; code fails to compile or runs with deprecation warnings that break strict builds.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity configuration from fluent builder style to lambda DSL style.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: The fluent builder style (using .and()) is deprecated in Spring Security 6 and removed in later versions; code fails to compile.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Spring Boot 3 requirements.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 runs on Jakarta EE 9+ which uses the jakarta.* namespace; using javax.servlet results in ClassNotFoundException or compilation errors because the classes no longer exist under that package.
